# ADR 0001: Initial Project Foundation

**Status:** Proposed
**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD

## Context
We are creating <Project Name> and need to establish the initial foundations for:
- project shape and scope
- documentation structure
- architectural direction
- testing strategy
- contributor expectations

## Decision
We will:
- use a docs-first foundation for the repo
- document primary personas and user workflows up front
- define tagged requirements with verification mapping
- define explicit testing levels and tools early
- cross-link durable project docs rather than relying on a single plan document

## Rationale
- <why docs-first is appropriate>
- <why user workflows should be explicit>
- <why tagged requirements matter>
- <why testing strategy should be documented early>
